_comment: Prestage config for the H100 box: exactly what the four planned specs need (g2_sufficiency, g2_robustness, g5_faithfulness, g0_interleaved). One reasoner (Qwen3-VL-8B), one vision ranker (ColQwen3; bm25 needs no weights), one parser (PaddleOCR-VL, the TL/TLV text channel), MMLongBench. Pass to prestage with --config; add --local when running directly on the box.
